data.author: did:plc:3fjrbeu3ccegtqjnov4ol7xx

data.body:
The earring is always right.

The earring begins by only offering advice on major life decisions. However, as it gets to know a wearer, it becomes more gregarious, and will offer advice on everything from what time to go to sleep, to what to eat for breakfast.
data.author: did:plc:3fjrbeu3ccegtqjnov4ol7xx
